content.text: System shall open a right-side panel when the user clicks the Component Corrosion (L5) test from the Rules and Action → Testing list.
a configuration panel to open when I select the Component Corrosion test
I can review the rule configuration.
I am viewing the Rules and Action → Testing list,
I click the Component Corrosion (L5) test,
the system opens a right-side configuration panel.
System shall display the panel title “Component Corrosion (L5) — Configuration” at the top of the panel.
the configuration panel title displayed at the top
I know which test configuration I am viewing.
the system displays the title “Component Corrosion (L5) — Configuration”.
System shall display the test scope label (Local) beside the test title.
see the test scope label displayed beside the title
I know the scope of the rule.
the configuration panel header is displayed,
the system shows the test scope label “Local”.
System shall display a test description that the test “evaluates section loss percentage due to corrosion.”
a description explaining the test purpose
I understand what the rule evaluates.
the system displays the text indicating the test “evaluates section loss percentage due to corrosion.”
System shall display the Measured Parameters section listing the parameters required for corrosion evaluation.
I understand which parameters are used for corrosion evaluation.
the system displays a Measured Parameters section.
System shall display Original Section Area (A₀) as an input parameter reference for corrosion evaluation.
the Original Section Area displayed as a parameter reference
I know the baseline value used for corrosion evaluation.
the Measured Parameters section is visible,
the system shows Original Section Area (A₀).
System shall display Remaining Section Area (Aᵣ) as an input parameter reference for corrosion evaluation.
the Remaining Section Area displayed as a parameter reference
I know the measured value used in corrosion evaluation.
the Measured Parameters section is visible,
the system shows Remaining Section Area (Aᵣ).
System shall display a note indicating that corrosion thresholds are system-defined based on IRDS structural safety standards.
see a note indicating corrosion thresholds are system-defined
I understand they cannot be modified.
the system shows a note indicating thresholds are system-defined based on IRDS structural safety standards.
System shall display the Severity Logic section defining corrosion severity categories.
I understand how corrosion severity is determined.
the system shows the Severity Logic section.
System shall define Green severity when corrosion loss is ≤ 10%.
the Green severity condition defined for corrosion loss
I know when corrosion remains within acceptable limits.
the system defines it as corrosion loss ≤ 10%.

11.title: Define Amber Severity Condition for Corrosion Loss

content.text: System shall define Amber severity when corrosion loss is > 10% and ≤ 20%.
the Amber severity condition defined for corrosion loss
I know when corrosion requires monitoring.
the system defines it as corrosion loss > 10% and ≤ 20%.

12.title: Define Red Severity Condition for Corrosion Loss

content.text: System shall define Red severity when corrosion loss is > 20%.
the red severity condition defined for corrosion loss
I know when corrosion becomes critical.
the system defines it as corrosion loss > 20%.
System shall visually represent severity categories using color indicators (Green, Amber, Red).
I can quickly distinguish severity levels.
the system displays color indicators for Green, Amber, and Red.
System shall display a Critical Escalation section indicating that severe corrosion at load-bearing connections requires structural assessment.
I understand when structural assessment is required.
the system shows a section indicating that severe corrosion at load-bearing connections requires structural assessment.
System shall display the Calculation Method section for corrosion loss percentage.
see the calculation method used for corrosion evaluation
I understand how corrosion loss is derived.
the evaluation logic section is visible,
the system shows a Calculation Method section.
System shall calculate corrosion loss using the formula Loss % = ((A₀ − Aᵣ) / A₀) × 100.
the system to calculate corrosion loss automatically
Original Section Area (A₀) and Remaining Section Area (Aᵣ) values are available,
the system calculates corrosion loss using the formula:
System shall display the System Defined label indicating that configuration values cannot be modified by the user.
I understand configuration values cannot be modified.
the system shows a “System Defined” label indicating values cannot be modified.
System shall provide a Close button to allow the user to exit the side panel.
a Close button available in the panel
I can exit the configuration view.
the system provides a Close button.
System shall provide a close (X) icon at the top-right corner of the panel.
a close (X) icon in the panel header
I can quickly dismiss the configuration panel.
the system shows a close (X) icon in the top-right corner.

20.title: Return to Testing List After Closing Panel

content.text: System shall close the panel and return the user to the Rules and Action → Testing list screen when the Close action is triggered.
the system to return me to the Rules and Action → Testing list
I can continue reviewing other tests.
I click the Close button or the close (X) icon,
the system closes the panel and returns me to the Rules and Action → Testing list screen.
